V-M-008.checks: Background jobs do not auto-assign complimentary internal access or mutate manually managed clients unexpectedly. Subscription expiry task correctly deactivates expired subscriptions and decrements server.current_clients counter. Daily cleanup, configurable anti-abuse handshake detection, and KPprotoN MTProto policy replay tasks run without errors.
V-M-008.commands: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_scheduler.py -v

scenarios.scenario: Handshake anomaly job interval is configured from ANTI_ABUSE_SCAN_INTERVAL_SECONDS
MTProto policy sync job is registered once and delegates active KPprotoN SNI replay to M-044 safely
Phase-43 registers MTProto telemetry ingest, abuse scan, rollup rebuild, raw event prune, IP observation prune, and storage-budget health checks without duplicate job ids
Retention job failure is logged and does not stop MTProto policy replay or subscription expiry jobs

phase-43-checks.check-1: Scheduler registers Phase-43 jobs exactly once with deterministic ids.
phase-43-checks.check-2: Abuse scan delegates high/critical alert creation to M-056/M-060 without automatic enforcement.
phase-43-checks.check-3: Retention jobs delegate raw event pruning to M-054 and exact IP pruning to M-061.
phase-43-checks.check-4: Storage-budget checks report health state and do not log raw IPs or secrets.

evidence.evidence-1: 2026-05-14: tests/test_scheduler.py passed as part of Phase-30 target pytest gate.
evidence.evidence-2: 2026-05-19: Phase-41 scheduler regression passed after removing official manifest sync from the active reconciliation path.
